sites.name: Daraz Nepal
sites.note: 47+ cities, 15+ delivery hubs including a dedicated Bharatpur (Chitwan) pickup point. Widest catalog, buyer protection, 'Daraz Mall' badge = verified seller. Best default choice for Chitwan/Gaindakot.

sites.name: SmartDoko
sites.note: IMS Group backed, reward-point system. Coverage outside the Valley wasn't independently confirmable — check your city at checkout.

sites.name: Thulo.com
sites.note: Older, still-active general marketplace. Confirm Chitwan/Gaindakot delivery before ordering.

sites.name: Sastodeal
sites.note: Fashion-focused, partnered with Flipkart/Myntra imports. Some post-pandemic reliability complaints reported — check recent reviews first.

sites.name: Max International
sites.note: Authorized Logitech distributor — genuine warranty. Kathmandu-based; confirm the courier fee for Chitwan/Gaindakot at checkout.

sites.name: Electronest Nepal
sites.note: Logitech accessories, verified live pricing. Confirm delivery fee/time to your city.

sites.name: ITTI Computer World
sites.note: Broad computer accessories catalog with nationwide courier shipping.

sites.name: InfoTechs Nepal
sites.note: Peripherals, storage, keyboards and mice — courier delivery nationwide.

sites.name: Quality Computer
sites.note: Budget storage devices and networking gear.

sites.name: Megatech Group
sites.note: Genuine branded storage, SanDisk specialist. Watch for baseline 'discount' pricing tricks.

sites.name: ONIN Infosys
sites.note: Networking gear, router UPS units, USB dongles.

sites.name: Hamrobazar
sites.note: Huge used-goods market, but no platform-backed refund mechanism. Many Kathmandu sellers only do in-person meetup — confirm the individual seller will ship to Chitwan/Gaindakot before paying anything.

sites.name: Ubuy Nepal
sites.note: Imported/luxury brands not sold locally. Ships countrywide but expect longer transit and customs handling time.

sites.name: Foodmandu
sites.note: Confirmed coverage: Kathmandu, Lalitpur, Bhaktapur, and limited parts of Pokhara only. Do not expect service in Chitwan or Gaindakot.

sites.name: Gyapu
sites.note: Popular for Kathmandu Valley household staples. No confirmed evidence of Chitwan/Gaindakot service — check before assuming it's available.

problems.title: Counterfeit / fake-branded goods
problems.body: Electronics, cosmetics and "luxury" items are frequently sold as genuine but are knockoffs, especially outside official distributors or a marketplace's verified-seller badge.

problems.title: No functioning consumer courts
problems.body: Nepal's Supreme Court ordered consumer courts set up in all seven provinces years ago; the government still hasn't done it, so shoppers have no fast legal channel for disputes.

problems.title: Outdated cyber & consumer law
problems.body: The Electronic Transaction Act (2008) predates e-commerce entirely, and the Consumer Protection Act (2018) doesn't clearly cover digital transaction disputes.

problems.title: Unregistered Facebook/Instagram "shops"
problems.body: Informal sellers with no business registration or PAN who vanish after taking payment. A separate, higher-risk category from the registered sites in this directory.

problems.title: Advance-payment fraud
problems.body: Sellers demanding 100% prepayment for "limited stock" items that never arrive, then going unreachable.

problems.title: Slower, less certain delivery outside the Valley
problems.body: Next-day express is largely a Kathmandu Valley feature; Chitwan/Gaindakot and other cities typically get 2–5 business day standard delivery, longer during monsoon landslides or festival-season surges.

problems.title: Wrong item shipped, slow returns
problems.body: Especially common with lesser-known or informal sellers; registered platforms handle this far better than social-media stores.

problems.title: No buyer protection on classifieds
problems.body: Hamrobazar-style peer-to-peer listings have no platform-backed refund mechanism; you're negotiating directly with a stranger.

problems.title: Fake "discount" pricing
problems.body: An inflated "original price" crossed out next to a normal price, designed to make a standard rate look like a deal.

problems.title: Cash-on-delivery often restricted to the Valley
problems.body: Many sellers require prepayment for Chitwan/Gaindakot and other outer regions, raising fraud risk since you can't verify goods before paying.

problems.title: Overwhelmed Cyber Bureau
problems.body: Nepal Police's Cyber Bureau logs thousands of online-fraud cases a year but lacks the staff/technical capacity to investigate most of them promptly.

problems.title: Grocery/food-delivery apps are hyper-local
problems.body: Foodmandu and similar quick-commerce apps are largely Kathmandu Valley (+ limited Pokhara) only. They generally do not operate in Chitwan or Gaindakot — don't assume coverage.
